label: Transparent tundra moss motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Tundra transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a tundra moss motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete natural subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact arctic tundra moss cushion and lichen patch, low rounded clumps of moss green with fine velvety filaments, pale lichen grey branching crusts, small snow-white frost crystals nestled between moss pads, sparse frozen plain character, botanical texture and scale. The identity must read as tundra moss from an arctic plain, not forest moss, tropical moss, grass lawn, coral, seaweed, or generic shrub.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include an irregular low horizontal patch silhouette, visible moss tufts, lichen flakes, and frost details without cropping. Clean diffuse studio light that preserves green, grey, and snow-white detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape horizon, no rocks, no flowers, no animals, no hand, no pot, no props, no text, no watermark, no second plant species beyond moss and lichen, no loose soil pile.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Tundra light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Tundra", derived from a tundra moss motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sparse dashboard system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160. Clean professional UI design-system presentation. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Tundra, Tundra Moss, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Sparse Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from arctic plain tundra moss: deep moss green tufts, lichen grey branching shapes, snow white frost, low horizontal sparse growth, cold mineral neutrals, open negative space, quiet resilience. The board must read as tundra moss from an arctic plain, not forest moss, grass lawn, tropical plant, coral, or generic stone.
Typography: English sparse dashboard UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, Japanese UI, Heading, Body, Label, Numerals. Use concise bilingual monitoring, sensor, map, report, and operations labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sensor tiles, map status panel, operations summary, table rows, event list, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, scatter plot, empty/loading/error states, progress, filters, date range, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: sparse dashboard system, precise 8px grid and 6px to 8px card radius, snow-white and frost-white surfaces, moss-green primary actions, lichen-grey secondary panels, charcoal-moss ink, quiet low-contrast borders, wide negative space, horizontal tundra strata, subtle moss filament and lichen branching texture overlays, calm arctic monitoring dashboard, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no forest cabin identity, no tropical green palette, no beige-only palette, no full landscape illustration, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Tundra", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Tundra dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Tundra" / "Tundra Moss". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160. Clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Tundra, Tundra Moss, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Sparse Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve moss-green actions, lichen-grey secondary panels, snow-white foreground text, frost-white highlights, charcoal-moss backgrounds, quiet arctic dashboard spacing, low horizontal tundra strata, moss filament texture, lichen branching texture, sensor tiles, map status panels, operations tables, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as tundra moss from an arctic plain, not forest moss, grass lawn, tropical plant, coral, or generic stone.
Typography: English sparse dashboard UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, Japanese UI, Heading, Body, Label, Numerals. Use concise bilingual monitoring, sensor, map, report, and operations labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, sensor cards, map panel, operations metrics, event table rows, line chart, bar chart, scatter plot, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, date range, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep charcoal-moss background, lichen graphite cards, snow-white text, muted moss primary active states, pale lichen grey borders, frost-white focus glow, restrained contrast, wide negative space, thin tundra-strata separators, subtle moss filament and lichen branching overlays, crisp controls and quiet dashboards.
Constraints: no neon green, no generic black-and-green hacker UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no forest cabin identity, no tropical identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Tundra", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
